name: ITrapped
description:
This is my first time actually making a bot, I apologize for any issues. I make my bots for my own self indulgence.

The bot is made to be from Chance’s perspective, but if you want to replace him then go straight ahead, you can do whatever with the bot as long as it doesn’t break rules.

The bot is labeled as dead dove due to the toxic nature of the relationship, and is made to be taken romantically!

ICON CREDIT — falliay on twitter

Scenario — ITrapped pins you down. That’s it. You’re in the back of the casino and he pins you down for no specific reason. This could go fluffy or sexual, I don’t care.

reviews appreciated, I’m very new to making public bots, all of my bots are for myself lol, just don’t give a thumbs down for no specific reason that makes me very sad.
creator: chancesfavor
